zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel Sais ap Einion於1272年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾時，他的父親Rhys ap Llywelyn43歲，母親Catrim Gruffudd22歲。他與Lettice verch Cadwaldar結婚。他們至少是9個兒子的父母。他去世於1320年在英國英格蘭享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel Sais ap Einion于1272年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾时，他的父亲Rhys ap Llywelyn43岁，母亲Catrim Gruffudd22岁。他与Lettice verch Cadwaldar结婚。他们至少是9个儿子的父母。他去世于1320年在英国英格兰享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: Sais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Orlando, Angelita, Arturo, Delfina, Desiderio, Dionicio, Edgardo, Elva, Fidel, Isidoro, Jere.
Catalan: topographic name from saix ‘rock’ (from Latin saxum), or an ethnic name for a Saxon, derived from the root of saxó ‘Saxon’.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel Sais ap Einion was born in 1272, in Breconshire, Wales, his father, Rhys ap Llywelyn, was 43 and his mother, Catrim Gruffudd, was 22. He married Lettice verch Cadwaldar. They were the parents of at least 9 sons. He died in 1320, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel Sais ap Einion est né en 1272, à Breconshire, Galles, son père, Rhys ap Llywelyn, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Catrim Gruffudd, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lettice verch Cadwaldar. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils. Il est décédé en 1320, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel Sais ap Einion 1272 in Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys ap Llywelyn 43 und seine Mutter Catrim Gruffudd 22. Er hat Lettice verch Cadwaldar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 48 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Sais ap Einion è nato il nel 1272 nel Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Rhys ap Llywelyn, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Catrim Gruffudd, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lettice verch Cadwaldar. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli. Morì nel 1320, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Einionが1272年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Rhys ap Llywelynは43歳，母Catrim Gruffuddは22歳であった。Lettice verch Cadwaldarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子の親であった。彼は1320年にイギリスイギリスで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel Sais ap Einion(이)가 1272년 웨일스 브레콘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys ap Llywelyn(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Catrim Gruffudd(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Lettice verch Cadwaldar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Sais ap Einion nasceu em 1272, em Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhys ap Llywelyn, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Catrim Gruffudd, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lettice verch Cadwaldar. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1320, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel Sais ap Einion родился в 1272 г. в местности брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Rhys ap Llywelyn было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Catrim Gruffudd, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lettice verch Cadwaldar. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel Sais ap Einion nació en 1272, en Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Rhys ap Llywelyn, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Catrim Gruffudd, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lettice verch Cadwaldar. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos. Murió en 1320, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
